name: Ryzi Me Araka (Rice and Peas)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Hot water or vegetable broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a medium-size heavy saucepan.
2. Sauté the onions until tender.
3. Add the rice and stir until all grains are well-coated.
4. Add peas, salt, and pepper (use less salt if using vegetable broth), and stir.
5. Add hot water or vegetable broth, bring to a boil, and cook over low heat for 25 minutes.
Nutritional analysis per serving: 150 calories, 5 grams protein, 3 grams fat, 32 grams carbohydrate.
